name: TSS Consultancy Pvt. Ltd.
description: TSS Consultancy Pvt. Ltd. is an innovative technology solutions provider primarily focusing on product development for the financial regulatory sector. Under their flagship product TrackWizz, they offer world-class AML (Anti Money Laundering) and Compliance solutions that empower banks and financial institutions to fight financial crime effectively.

products.name: TrackWizz AML Suite
products.description: Comprehensive Anti Money Laundering software designed for monitoring millions of financial transactions daily.

products.name: TrackWizz KYC & Onboarding
products.description: Automated customer onboarding and risk screening against global sanction lists and databases.

products.name: Regulatory Reporting Engine
products.description: Automated reporting module seamlessly integrating with regulatory bodies to file STRs/SARs.
